div.p: Objective: Select the most specific route for Destination IP: 10.1.1.50

ol.li: Longest Prefix Wins: Higher bit-count in netmask always overrides metric.
Metric Tie-Break: If prefix lengths are identical, route with lowest metric is chosen.
Default Fallback: 0.0.0.0/0 matches only if no other prefixes satisfy the mask.

div.p: Initialize search registers to identity values. LPM requires scanning available route entries.
Current Best: 10 Candidate: 5 Action: Update Best
